description: Outputs generated by a successfully provisioned Function.

commandsPushTarget.description:
Push target for commands delivery. Platform-specific:
- AWS: Lambda function name or ARN
- GCP: Full Pub/Sub topic path (projects/{project}/topics/{topic})
- Azure: Service Bus "{namespace}/{queue}"

oneOf.description:
Load balancer endpoint information for DNS management (optional).
Used by the DNS controller to create custom domain mappings.

dnsName.description: The DNS name of the load balancer endpoint (e.g., ALB DNS, API Gateway domain).

hostedZoneId.description: AWS Route53 hosted zone ID (for ALIAS records). Only set on AWS.

url.description: The invocation URL (if applicable, e.g., for public ingress or specific platforms).
